review_comment: bonus: the partition can be made even more explicit with https://docs.rs/itertools/0.10.1/itertools/trait.Itertools.html#method.cartesian_product :) (i know you like iterators)

I could, but the problem is that I make two tests independently of the content-type (the no content-type and the good content-type tests).

If I understood correctly, the cartesian_product would not help me here, or I would need to redo these two tests for every content_type instead of doing it only once?
